description_long: This is a large, modern shelving and storage unit with a striking geometric design, featuring alternating horizontal stripes of dark and light wood tones. The structure consists of two tall vertical columns connected by a wide horizontal shelf, creating an open central space. The columns are fitted with a mix of open shelves and closed compartments, some with visible books and documents, and two lower drawers on each side. The surfaces are mostly flat and hard, with a matte to semi-gloss finish, and the overall construction appears robust and substantial. The back and sides are solid black, contrasting with the patterned front and interior shelves. The unit is freestanding and designed to be placed against a wall or as a room divider in an urban environment such as a library, office, or public space.
description: A large, freestanding shelving and storage unit with striped wood patterns, open shelves, and lower drawers, featuring a modern geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped wood pattern, open shelves, closed compartments, and two lower drawers, with visible books on the right.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the unit, the thickness of the columns, and the protruding shelves and compartments.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black back panels and the horizontal shelf connecting the two columns, with books visible on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same depth and protruding shelves as the other side, with less detail visible than the front.
